understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete each level by moving all selectable pieces onto goal tiles marked '+', such that every goal tile is simultaneously occupied, using a limited number of actions.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: From my experience, pieces move in discrete steps on a grid. Clicking an empty tile causes the currently selected piece to move there if a clear path exists, otherwise it fails. Directional moves (MOVE_RIGHT, MOVE_UP) shift the piece by one tile in that direction if unobstructed. Push mechanics seem absent—pieces do not push obstacles or other pieces. Obstacles block movement, causing actions to fail. Only one piece is selected at a time, and selection changes rarely seem automatic. Actions are limited per level, requiring efficient path planning.
